mapper.insert: INSERT INTO selection_apply ( user_id, user_name, contact_phone, delivery_address, spu_id, spu_name, shop_id, shop_name, main_img_url, price_fee, apply_remark, apply_time, audit_status ) VALUES ( #{selectionApply.userId}, #{selectionApply.userName}, #{selectionApply.contactPhone}, #{selectionApply.deliveryAddress}, #{selectionApply.spuId}, #{selectionApply.spuName}, #{selectionApply.shopId}, #{selectionApply.shopName}, #{selectionApply.mainImgUrl}, #{selectionApply.priceFee}, #{selectionApply.applyRemark}, #{selectionApply.applyTime}, #{selectionApply.auditStatus} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE selection_apply
audit_status = #{selectionApply.auditStatus},
audit_time = #{selectionApply.auditTime},
audit_user_id = #{selectionApply.auditUserId},
audit_remark = #{selectionApply.auditRemark},
express_company = #{selectionApply.expressCompany},
express_no = #{selectionApply.expressNo},
ship_time = #{selectionApply.shipTime},
WHERE apply_id = #{selectionApply.applyId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM selection_apply WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM selection_apply WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND audit_status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM selection_apply WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND audit_status = 2
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM selection_apply WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND audit_status = 3
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM selection_apply WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND DATE(apply_time) = CURDATE()
